Headline: Crude Oil Prices Are Poised to Jump, Price Action Signals
Summary: Price action is sending a message: Crude oil, the lonely laggard in a yearlong surge for commodities, may be getting ready to bounce higher.  Oil prices have gone more or less nowhere as gold, silver, copper, platinum, and palladium have all posted powerful moves.  Several factors may be responsible, including weaker-than-expected overseas demand, concerns over slowing global economic growth, and political pressure to keep pump prices in check ahead of the midterm elections.
